IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO COMBAT CRIPPLING BONE AND JOINT DISEASE IN OKLAHOMA VIA EDUCATION, TREATMENT AND RESEARCH.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO COMBAT CRIPPLING BONE AND JOINT DISEASE IN OKLAHOMA VIA EDUCATION, TREATMENT, AND RESEARCH.
IRS990.Desc: PROVIDED EDUCATION SEMINARS ARE TOPICS RELATING TO BONE AND JOINT DISEASE AND SPORTS INJURY PREVENTION. ALSO PROVIDE PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT TO COACHES ON INJURY PREVENTION PRACTICES. PROVIDE EDUCATION MATERIALS TO PUBLIC SCHOOLS ON SPORTS INJURY PREVENTION. WORK WITH SCHOOLS ON WHAT NEEDS ARE MOST URGENT TO IMPLEMENT SAFETY PRACTICES INTO THE ATHLETIC DEPARTMENT AND PAIR THEM WITH COMMUNITY RESOURCES TO ACQUIRE NEEDS. PROVIDE INFORMATION TO SCHOOL BOARDS AND THE COMMUNITY ON THE IMPORTANCE OF ATHLETIC TRAINERS IN SCHOOLS.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: THE FOUNDATION AWARDS PRESERVE SPORTS INJURY PREVENTION GRANTS TO UNDERPRIVELAGED SCHOOLS. THESE GRANTS ARE TO REPLACE OLD, UNSAFE SPORTS EQUIPMENT AND CAN ALSO PURCHASE FIRST AID EQUIPMENT. THE FOUNDATION ALSO PROVIDES SCHOOLS PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT ABOUT INJURY PREVENTION IN YOUTH SPORTS.

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: SUPPORT SPORTS PROGRAMS IN NEED OF SAFETY EQUIPMENT

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE GOVERNING BODY IS PROVIDED A COPY OF THE FORM 990 FOR REVIEW BEFORE FILING. THEY REVIEW THE ACCURACY AND PRESENTATION OF INFORMATION CONTAINED IN RETURN.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ANNUALLY BOARD MEMBERS ARE ASKED TO REVIEW THE ORGANIZATION CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND DISCLOSE ANY POTENTIAL CONFLICTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, POLICIES, AND FINANCIALS ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

PROFESSIONAL FEES: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 50,233. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 9,329. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 12,199. TOTAL EXPENSES 71,761. BANK FEES: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 699. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 130. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 170. TOTAL EXPENSES 999.
